name: WebDMMbrPrcsAccumRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC SET CDM_LOAD_IN = 'Y' WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MBR_PRCS_ACCUM' AND CYC_STTUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle}

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

PROCESSING:  Update the IDS P_RUN_CYCLE field CDM_LOAD_IN so these records are not re-extracted the next time IdsMbrAccumDataMartCntl runs



MODIFICATIONS:

Date                 Developer                Change Description                                                                                    Code Reviewer                                      Date
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2006-04-07      Sharon Andrew           Original Programming.

08/26/2013     Archana Palivela           Original Programming     

02/18/2015      Manasa Andru            Modified the SQL in the db2_P_RUN_CYC_out step.                             Kalyan Neelam                                    2015-02-23

Annotations:
Job Name;
WebDMMbrPrcsAccumRunCycUpd_EE
Read all the Data from IDS P_RUN_CYC Table; 
Pull records based on ExtractRunCycle
MBR_PRCS_ACCUM
Set CDM_LOAD_IN to Y for SUBJ_CD = ''MBR_PRCS_ACCUM'' and TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS'
Update P_RUN_CYC table
